# This file is part of the Navitab project. See the README and LICENSE for details.

# This file is a basic CMake wrapper for the geotiff external library, used instead
# of the provided CMake support.

set(SAVED_CMAKE_MODULE_PATH ${CMAKE_MODULE_PATH})
list(PREPEND CMAKE_MODULE_PATH "${CMAKE_CURRENT_LIST_DIR}/cmake")
set(GEOTIFF_CSV_DATA_DIR "${NAVITAB_geotiff_SOURCE_DIR}/libgeotiff/csv")
set(WITH_UTILITIES FALSE CACHE BOOL "Choose if GeoTIFF utilities should be built")
set(TIFF_FOUND TRUE CACHE INTERNAL "")
set(HAVE_TIFFOPEN TRUE)
set(HAVE_TIFFMERGEFIELDINFO TRUE)

add_subdirectory("${NAVITAB_geotiff_SOURCE_DIR}/libgeotiff" "${NAVITAB_geotiff_BINARY_DIR}" EXCLUDE_FROM_ALL)
target_include_directories(geotiff_library PRIVATE "${NAVITAB_proj_INCDIRS}")
add_library(geotiff ALIAS geotiff_library)

unset(TIFF_FOUND CACHE)
set(CMAKE_MODULE_PATH ${SAVED_CMAKE_MODULE_PATH})
unset(SAVED_CMAKE_MODULE_PATH)

# Cache settings to be used when BUILD_NAVITAB_THIRDPARTY is OFF
set(NAVITAB_geotiff_PKGLIBS geotiff CACHE INTERNAL "")
if(MSVC)
    set(NAVITAB_geotiff_LOCATION "${NAVITAB_LIBS3RD_DIR}/geotiff.lib" CACHE INTERNAL "")
else()
    set(NAVITAB_geotiff_LOCATION "${NAVITAB_LIBS3RD_DIR}/libgeotiff.a" CACHE INTERNAL "")
endif()
set(NAVITAB_geotiff_INCDIRS "${NAVITAB_geotiff_BINARY_DIR}" "${NAVITAB_geotiff_SOURCE_DIR}/libgeotiff" CACHE INTERNAL "")
set(NAVITAB_geotiff_LINKLIBS tiff proj CACHE INTERNAL "")
